data.title: Microservices Architecture
data.description: Uses microservices for scaling and independent deployment.
data.technical_spec: Decomposed services managing different business functions connected via APIs.

data.title: Scalable Infrastructure
data.description: Designed to handle massive amounts of user data and interactions.
data.technical_spec: Utilizes cloud-based services with auto-scaling capabilities.

data.title: Graph Database Integration
data.description: Employs a graph database for complex relationships and recommendations.
data.technical_spec: Integrated with systems that visualize user connections and interactions.

data.title: Load Balancing
data.description: Distributes network traffic to maintain performance.
data.technical_spec: Uses reverse proxy servers to evenly distribute requests.

data.title: RESTful and GraphQL APIs
data.description: APIs for third-party integrations and internal data transactions.
data.technical_spec: Supports RESTful services and GraphQL for flexible querying.
